'''√n-v-k''' ('''kanavak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lindy|lindy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lindy|lindy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-v-k
|-
! Lemma
| kanavak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thinavak || jinavak || shinavak || kinavak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthunavak || jujunavak || shushunavak || kukunavak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thunavak || junavak || shunavak || kunavak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thunavak || junavak || shunavak || kunavak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thenavak || jenavak || shenavak || kenavak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothonavak || jojonavak || shoshonavak || kokonavak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thonavak || jonavak || shonavak || konavak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thonavak || jonavak || shonavak || konavak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || navak || navak || navak || navak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || navak || navak || navak || navak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || navak || navak || navak || navak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || navak || navak || navak || navak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thænavak || jænavak || shænavak || kænavak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathanavak || jajanavak || shashanavak || kakanavak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thanavak || janavak || shanavak || kanavak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thanavak || janavak || shanavak || kanavak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shanavak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshanavak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishanavak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shanavaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshanavaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishanavaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shanavakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshanavaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishanavakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shanavakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshanavaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishanavakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shanavakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshanavaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishanavakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shanavaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshanavaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishanavaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shanavakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshanavaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishanavakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shanavakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshanavaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishanavakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shanavakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshanavaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishanavakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shanavaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshanavaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishanavaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shanavaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanavaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanavaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shanavaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshanavaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanavaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shanavakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshanavaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishanavakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shanavakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanavaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanavakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shanavakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshanavaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanavakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shanavakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshanavaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishanavakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shanavakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshanavaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishanavakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shanavakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshanavaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanavakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shanavakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshanavaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishanavakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shanavakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshanavaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishanavakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shanavakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanavaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanavakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
